name: Brighton Pickleball Club
description: Indoor facility in Brighton, Michigan with tri-directional pickleball direct/indirect LED lighting.
open_play_schedule: Schedule is on Brighton Pickleball Club's Court Reserve App
fees: Private — Memberships and drop in rates at https://brightonpickleballclub.com/

name: Hamburg Senior Center
description: Covered picnic tables, windscreens, and portable toilet.

name: Hartland Senior Activity Center
description: Come play pickleball at Hartland Senior Activity Center in Howell, MI! There are 4 outdoor hard courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. Reservations are not available. Amenities include restrooms. The courts are free.
open_play_schedule: Outdoor Play is Free all summer and open to the public from sunrise to sunset (there are no lights).  Portajohns are on site.

name: Howell Area Parks & Recreation (Oceola Community Center)
description: Howell Area Parks & Recreation (Oceola Community Center) is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Howell, MI. There are 6 indoor wood courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. A membership is required to play. You can’t reserve the courts. The facility includes amenities like locker rooms, restrooms, water, and wheelchair accessibility.
hours: 8am-8pm) Tuesday / Thursday 8am-10pm (Office Hours - 8am-8pm) Friday 5:30am-5pm (Office Hours - 8am-5pm) Saturday 8am-1pm (members only) (Office closed) Sunday 9am-2pm (members only) (Office closed) Phone: (517) 546-0693 Email: parksandrec@howellrecreation.org

name: Legacy Center Sports Complex
description: Legacy Center Sports Complex is a place to play pickleball in Brighton, MI. There are 8 indoor wood courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. Players have access to restrooms and water. A one-time fee is required to play. You can reserve the courts.

name: Navigator School
description: Come play pickleball at Navigator School in Pinckney, MI! There are 8 asphalt and wood courts. 4 are indoors and 4 are outdoors. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. A one-time fee is required to play. Players have access to restrooms, wheelchair accessibility, and water.
fees: Fee required — Indoor court fee only, outdoor free of charge

name: Oak Pointe Country Club
description: Come play pickleball at Oak Pointe Country Club in Brighton, MI! There are 4 outdoor concrete courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. Players have access to restrooms and lights. A membership is required to play.

name: SELCRA Meijer Park
description: Come play pickleball at SELCRA Meijer Park in Brighton, MI! There are 4 outdoor courts. The lines are permanent, but you'll need to bring your own net. A one-time fee is required to play.
